channel.title: Cold Foam on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Cold Foam on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Sweet Cream Recipe for Coffee: Vanilla, Cold Foam & More
item.description: Make sweet cream for coffee at home in 5 minutes. Simple recipe for vanilla sweet cream, cold foam topping, and coffee creamer — with ratios, variations, and storage tips.

item.title: How to Make Cold Foam at Home (4 Methods + Recipes)
item.description: Learn how to make cold foam at home using a milk frother, French press, blender, or whisk. Includes vanilla sweet cream cold foam, salted caramel, and chocolate variations.
